steps.title: Identify the secrecy signal
steps.content: The passage says Dr. Maldonado carries many family secrets and then says the secrets remain nicely bottled up beneath his hat. This image suggests that people trust him with confidences because he keeps them private.

steps.title: Reject appearance-based inferences
steps.content: Choice A focuses on his disheveled appearance, which is described humorously but not as something people tolerate. Choice C invents gossip about his own family, and Choice D speculates about professional expertise. The supported inference is that people are not worried he will reveal their secrets. The answer is B.
